apibuncloudflaredberrorextractfirestoremarkupreactschemasequencestoretestuiutil

Cache of `EndpointCache` objects for multiple endpoints. - Use `get(endpoint)` to retrieve or create the `EndpointCache` for a given endpoint, then `get(payload)` on that to get a specific `EndpointStore`.

provider

APIProvider<P, R>

get

(endpoint: Endpoint<PP, RR>) => EndpointCache<PP, RR>

Get (or create) the `EndpointCache` for the given endpoint.

get

(endpoint: Endpoint) => EndpointCache

call

(endpoint: Endpoint<PP, RR>, payload: PP, maxAge: number = AVOID_REFRESH, caller: AnyCaller = this.call) => Promise<RR>

Fetch (or return a cached result) for the given endpoint and payload. - Returns the cached value immediately if one exists. - Waits for the in-flight fetch if the store is loading. - Throws if the fetch fails, matching `APIProvider.call` behaviour.

invalidate

(endpoint: Endpoint<PP, RR>, payload: PP) => void

Invalidate a specific store for an endpoint.

invalidateAll

(endpoint: Endpoint<PP, RR>) => void

Invalidate all stores for an endpoint.

refresh

(endpoint: Endpoint<PP, RR>, payload: PP, maxAge?: number) => void

Trigger a refetch on a specific store for an endpoint.

refreshAll

(endpoint: Endpoint<PP, RR>, maxAge?: number) => void

Trigger a refetch on all stores for an endpoint.
